title: Frontier Echoes Double Exposure Poster AI
sourceTitle: Frontier Echoes Double Exposure Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: double-exposure persona poster built around rugged frontier traveler in side profile wearing a black hat and weathered coat. Subject: rugged frontier traveler in side profile wearing a black hat and weathered coat is the outer silhouette or hero figure, filled or surrounded by desert riders, steam train, canyon sunset, campfire silhouettes, frontier town, and distant mountain ridge. Scene: cinematic side-profile silhouette against a smoky sunset background frames the figure with atmosphere, depth, and narrative symbolism. Composition: Fixed double-exposure poster composition with strong silhouette readability, layered internal scenes, and clean title placement. Style: Cinematic double-exposure poster with polished layering, refined contrast, clear silhouette edge, and collectible editorial finish. Color Palette: Unified palette chosen to support the subject, clean contrast, readable details, and a premium finished image. Lighting: Believable polished lighting with controlled highlights, readable shadows, depth, and artifact-free detail. Camera: Clean camera perspective that keeps the main subject readable and preserves the template composition. Typography: FRONTIER ECHOES appears as the short poster caption or title, readable and integrated into the lower composition. Signature Elements: rugged frontier traveler in side profile wearing a black hat and weathered coat, desert riders, steam train, canyon sunset, campfire silhouettes, frontier town, and distant mountain ridge, FRONTIER ECHOES, and cinematic side-profile silhouette against a smoky sunset background define the reusable double-exposure mechanism. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: double-exposure persona poster built around solitary astronaut botanist in side profile wearing a worn mission helmet. Subject: solitary astronaut botanist in side profile wearing a worn mission helmet is the outer silhouette or hero figure, filled or surrounded by greenhouse domes, Mars ridge, seed vault, rover tracks, sunrise dust storm, and tiny sprouting plants. Typography: MARS GARDEN appears as the short poster caption or title, readable and integrated into the lower composition. Restrictions: Keep one coherent image, concrete subject detail, readable anatomy or object structure, clean text when present, no placeholder words, no watermark, no extra unrelated elements, and no artifact-heavy output.
